title: Minecraft City
description: If you want to build a city alone or with your friends this modspack is perfect for you! It adds many mods like vehicles, furniture, new blocks, building mods and more. So download it now and build your own city. Have fun
body:
You can use this modpack to build a city. It adds vehicles, new blocks, building gatgets, furniture and many other useful things. Download it to test it. Have Fun!

Some mods are from curseforge.
